S.FORM: Prokopis Pavlopoulos I 1950 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci Prokopis Pavlopoulos, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Greece anini i ci Prokopis Pavlopoulos, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 13 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: pro~uko~upis pab~v…æo~upo~uo~u~u…æo~us i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i pro~uko~upis pab~v…æo~upo~uo~u~u…æo~us, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u *r…ô…ô ¶…ô anini i ¶i pro~uko~upis pab~v…æo~upo~uo~u~u…æo~us, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Prokopis Pavlopoulos I 1950 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci Prokopis Pavlopoulos, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Greece anini i ci Prokopis Pavlopoulos, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 13 a romi'ad.
